site.title: WanderMap
site.description: Personal catalog of places I've visited. Honest reviews, ratings, and emotions.

about.title: About me
about.text1: Hi! I'm traveling across Asia and building my own catalog of tried-and-tested places — from street food to rooftop bars.
about.text2: Every place in WanderMap was visited by me personally. Ratings are honest, reviews are ad-free.
about.text3: Built with Nuxt 3 + Prisma + PostgreSQL as a learning project while mastering the Vue/Node.js stack.
